primary_blocker: Only needed interim management (not long-term) — product mismatch on duration
key_intelligence: EX-STL who wanted INTERIM management only — a short-term arrangement while transitioning to something else. Stayful's 6-month minimum term didn't fit the requirement. Insufficient STL uplift vs LTL was the secondary reason. PATTERN: Leads wanting interim or trial arrangements without minimum commitment are unlikely to convert under standard contract terms.
top_objections: I only need management for a short period
The uplift over LTL doesn't justify the 6-month commitment
lost_reason: Product mismatch: wanted interim/short-term management only. 6-month minimum term was a hard blocker.
